name: Coagentix (Co.AI / AOF)
summary: Professional multi-provider AI platform: multi-provider chat, TMAP multi-agent coding assistant, encrypted API key management. Next.js 14 + Supabase frontend, Express TMAP backend, and a terminal CLI.

aof-web.role: Next.js 14 App Router frontend + API routes (the main user-facing app)

tmap-v2.role: Express backend — TMAP v2 multi-agent pipeline, DARS routing, Titan, Chief Agent, vision, enterprise (orgs/teams/webhooks). Exposes /v1/* SSE API.

coagentix-cli.role: `coai` CLI — AI coding agent for the terminal (Advanced subscribers). Talks to tmap-v2 /v1/* and has local knowledge-graph/arch-detection/security/test tooling.

topLevelArtifacts.AOF_CODE_TDD.md: Master technical design doc (~64KB) for TMAP / Coagentix Code architecture
topLevelArtifacts.supabase/migrations/: Root-level migrations: CLI tokens, error logs
topLevelArtifacts.reports/: 30+ audit/phase reports (security, performance, db, AI systems, etc.)

areas.aof-web/src/app/(app): Authenticated app shell: home, chat, code, projects, settings
areas.aof-web/src/app/(marketing): Marketing pages: about, blog, contact, privacy, terms, cookies
areas.aof-web/src/app/admin: Admin panel UI (analytics, users, subs, feature-flags, logs, redeem-codes, api-monitoring)
areas.aof-web/src/app/api: 28 route handlers (chat, keys, conversations, admin/*, cli/*, search, health, feedback, referral)
areas.aof-web/src/components: 105 React components grouped by domain (chat, code, admin, ui, layout, settings, projects, diagnostics, mascot, ...)
areas.aof-web/src/store: 9 Zustand stores (auth, chat, code, project, ui, usage, guest, diagnostics)
areas.aof-web/src/lib: Client+server libs: router, raa, titan, errors, plans, access, keys, api, server/ai-providers, server/search/*
areas.tmap-v2/src/core: 44 agent/orchestration modules (orchestrator, agents, titan, chief-agent, vote, raa, memory, model-router, sandbox, ...)
areas.tmap-v2/src/dars: DARS resilience: classify, health, select, run
areas.tmap-v2/src/server: 40 server modules (index routes, auth, db, crypto, failover, redis, queue, teams, orgs, webhooks, ...)
areas.coagentix-cli/src: 25 CLI modules (knowledge-graph, arch-detector, debate, security-agent, test-generator, cost-optimizer, ...)
